name: [iam-jit] Admin-action burst
message:
More than 10 ADMIN_ACTION events from the iam-jit Bounce suite fired in the last 5 minutes.

ADMIN_ACTION events fire on operator-initiated CLI commands (mode swap, profile install, pause, rule edit). A burst usually means either a config-import script is running, an operator is iterating on a profile, or something is automating ibounce CLI calls. Worth a look either way.

Link to the saved search: https://app.datadoghq.com/logs?query=source%3Aiam-jit-bounce%20%40iam_jit.event_type%3AADMIN_ACTION

@your-team-here
